Michael Johnson
Dallas, TX

Summary
Dedicated warehouse associate with over 1 year of experience in fast-paced environments. Skilled in operating RF scanners and comfortable lifting heavy items. Strong attention to detail and a commitment to maintaining safety protocols. Eager to contribute to team success and improve operational efficiency.

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
March 2022 – Present  
- Operated RF scanners for inventory management and order fulfillment, ensuring accurate tracking of stock levels.  
- Assisted in loading and unloading shipments, regularly lifting up to 50 lbs to maintain workflow efficiency.  
- Collaborated with team members to optimize space utilization and improve organization within the warehouse.  
- Maintained cleanliness and safety standards throughout the work area, adhering to all safety regulations.

Material Handler  
XYZ Distribution, Fort Worth, TX  
January 2021 – February 2022  
- Supported warehouse operations by preparing and processing outgoing shipments, using hand tools and machinery as needed.  
- Involved in inventory checks and managed stock rotation to minimize waste and ensure product quality.  
- Provided excellent customer service by assisting in resolving shipping inquiries and coordinating with delivery personnel.

Certifications
- Forklift Operator Certification  
- OSHA Safety Training

Skills
- Proficient in RF scanning technology  
- Basic computer skills, including data entry and inventory management software  
- Strong physical stamina and ability to lift up to 50 lbs
